headline: CAMS Selected to Deliver Integrated Services for Aviator Wind, One of the Largest Single Site Wind Projects in the United States
summary: HOUSTON, May 19, 2026--CAMS to deliver integrated asset management, O&M, and compliance services for Aviator Wind, a 525 MW Texas wind project supporting ERCOT.

headline: 4 Low-Beta Utility Picks as Consumer Sentiment Hits Rock Bottom
summary: ATO, CMS, ED and AWR stand out as defensive utility picks as consumer sentiment weakens amid rising inflation and higher energy costs.
